stories.title: Autonomous micro-drone achieves first air-to-air insect kill on the way 'towards completely eradicating mosquitoes' — 40-gram unit uses car parking sensors, can eliminate insects at up to 26 feet

sources.summary: A micro-drone designed to locate and eradicate mosquitoes has passed an important milestone with its first recorded air-to-air kill.

stories.title: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB

sources.title: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
sources.title_en: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
sources.title_original: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
sources.summary: The 3GB GDDR7 chips that the RTX 50 Super GPUs will use reportedly cost twice to thrice as much as the 2GB chips found on vanilla RTX 50-series graphics cards. This would likely push the retail price of these GPUs way beyond Nvidia's target MSRP.
sources.summary_zh: 据报道，RTX 50 Super GPU 将使用的 3GB GDDR7 芯片的成本是普通 RTX 50 系列显卡上的 2GB 芯片的两倍到三倍。这可能会使这些 GPU 的零售价格远远超出 Nvidia 的目标建议零售价。

items.title: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB

stories.title: GTA 3 and Vice City are now playable inside San Andreas — a mod lets you revisit Liberty City and Vice City without leaving San Andreas

sources.title: GTA 3 and Vice City are now playable inside San Andreas — a mod lets you revisit Liberty City and Vice City without leaving San Andreas
sources.title_en: GTA 3 and Vice City are now playable inside San Andreas — a mod lets you revisit Liberty City and Vice City without leaving San Andreas
sources.title_original: GTA 3 and Vice City are now playable inside San Andreas — a mod lets you revisit Liberty City and Vice City without leaving San Andreas
sources.summary: A GTA modder has embedded GTA 3 and Vice City within San Andreas, even nesting Vice City within GTA 3, with all three games continuing to run simultaneously.
sources.summary_zh: GTA 改装者已将 GTA 3 和罪恶都市嵌入到圣安地列斯，甚至将罪恶都市嵌套在 GTA 3 中，所有三款游戏继续同时运行。

stories.title: Jurassic Park packed $4 million of legit 1993 computer hardware — a software engineer detailed every single piece of hardware in the film

sources.title: Jurassic Park packed $4 million of legit 1993 computer hardware — a software engineer detailed every single piece of hardware in the film
sources.title_en: Jurassic Park packed $4 million of legit 1993 computer hardware — a software engineer detailed every single piece of hardware in the film
sources.title_original: Jurassic Park packed $4 million of legit 1993 computer hardware — a software engineer detailed every single piece of hardware in the film
sources.summary: Google software engineer Fabien Sanglard meticulously listed the computer hardware and software used in the first Jurassic Park film. He even added details for each device, turning the film into something of a computer museum.
sources.summary_zh: 谷歌软件工程师 Fabien Sanglard 精心列出了第一部侏罗纪公园电影中使用的计算机硬件和软件。他甚至为每台设备添加了细节，将影片变成了一个计算机博物馆。

stories.title: Grab AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary CPU with motherboard and 16GB RAM for just $529 — save over $100 on this epic AMD gaming bundle

sources.summary: Newegg has a great combo bundle on sale with over $100 in savings for the fastest DDR4 gaming system you can build today. It pairs a Ryzen 7 5800X3D with 16GB of CL16 DDR4-3200 RAM and an Asus TUF Gaming B550-Plus WiFi II motherboard.
sources.summary_zh: Newegg 提供超值组合捆绑销售，可节省 100 多美元，打造您今天可以构建的最快 DDR4 游戏系统。它搭配 Ryzen 7 5800X3D 和 16GB CL16 DDR4-3200 RAM 以及 Asus TUF Gaming B550-Plus WiFi II 主板。

items.title_original: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items.summary: The AGI AI828 is a budget drive with subpar performance and power efficiency. This makes it a last resort, although in the current market, it might be good enough for some.
items.summary_zh: AGI AI828 是一款性能和能效均低于标准的预算驱动器。这使得它成为最后的手段，尽管在当前市场上，它对于某些人来说可能已经足够好了。

stories.title: Korean outfit hosting 1.44MB game development contest to honor the floppy disk — entrants must confine entire fileset, including resources, engine, and library, to miniscule storage format

sources.title_original: Korean outfit hosting 1.44MB game development contest to honor the floppy disk — entrants must confine entire fileset, including resources, engine, and library, to miniscule storage format
sources.summary: There’s a new 'open to everyone' floppy disk-size game development competition with cash prizes for the best three submissions.
sources.summary_zh: 新推出了“向所有人开放”的软盘大小的游戏开发竞赛，提交的最佳三项作品将获得现金奖励。
